items.name: Rusty Blade
items.description: A pitted and corroded short sword scavenged from a mass grave beneath the arena. Its edge is dull, but desperation sharpens the hand that wields it. Many slaves have drawn their first blood with such a wretched thing.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A simple legionary-issue gladius forged in the camp furnaces. It lacks elegance but delivers death with workmanlike efficiency. The iron holds an edge long enough for one good fight.

items.name: Chipped Hatchet
items.description: A woodcutter's tool repurposed for the arena floor. The handle is wrapped in stained rags to soak up the sweat and blood. It splits skulls nearly as well as it once split kindling.

items.name: Bone Shiv
items.description: Carved from the femur of a fallen gladiator and sharpened against the cell walls. It is the weapon of a condemned man with nothing left to lose. The marrow stains never fully wash away.

items.name: Training Gladius
items.description: A blunted practice sword issued to fresh recruits in the ludus. Though meant for sparring, a strong arm can still drive it through leather and flesh. Better than bare fists against the beasts.

items.name: Bent Trident
items.description: One prong is snapped off and another bends at an ugly angle, but the remaining tine still pierces. It was pulled from the corpse of a retiarius who bet on the wrong fight.

items.name: Slave Cleaver
items.description: A heavy butcher's blade stolen from the arena kitchens. Its weight makes it slow but devastating on impact. The meat it was made to cut is not so different from the meat in the arena.

items.name: Pit Fighter's Knife
items.description: A crude pugio favored in underground death matches beneath the city. Its short reach forces the wielder into intimate, brutal range. The leather grip is permanently darkened by old blood.

items.name: Notched Sica
items.description: A curved Thracian blade chipped from years of abuse, yet still capable of hooking past a shield rim. Every notch in the edge marks a blow that found bone. The lanista sells these cheaply to disposable fighters.

items.name: Corroded Spear
items.description: A pilum left to rot in the rain barrels behind the armory. Green corrosion eats at the iron head, but the shaft is still sound. It keeps enemies at distance, which is all a desperate man needs.

items.name: Steel Falcata
items.description: A forward-curving Iberian blade forged from good steel, designed to concentrate the force of a blow at the tip. Hispanian mercenaries brought this design to the arena, and the crowd loves its brutal chopping strikes.

items.name: Bronze Spatha
items.description: A longer cavalry sword cast in bronze and etched with laurel motifs. It was forged for mounted combat but serves well on foot for its superior reach. The bronze gleams like a baleful sun under the arena torches.

items.name: Barbed Trident
items.description: Three wicked prongs fitted with backward-facing barbs that tear flesh on withdrawal. Retiarii who carry this weapon are feared for the agonizing wounds they inflict. The crowd roars when the barbs catch.

items.name: Gladiator's Mace
items.description: A flanged iron mace designed to crush bone through armor. It requires brute strength rather than finesse, favored by provocatores who prefer to batter their opponents into submission. Each flange is stained a permanent rust-red.

items.name: Ashen Spear
items.description: A javelin carved from wood pulled out of a cremation pyre, its tip hardened in the same flames that consumed the dead. Superstitious fighters believe it carries the wrath of the unquiet dead. The shaft is warm to the touch even in winter.

items.name: Serpent Dagger
items.description: A wavy-bladed pugio modeled after a striking viper, its undulating edge leaves ragged wounds that resist stitching. Assassins and dimachaeri prize these twin-fanged blades. The pommel is cast as a coiled serpent with garnet eyes.

items.name: Scorched Gladius
items.description: Pulled from the ruins of a burning ludus, this blade is blackened but sound. The heat treatment accidentally tempered the steel beyond the smith's original craft. Soot clings to it no matter how many times it is cleaned.

items.name: Twin Sica
items.description: A matched pair of curved Thracian blades meant to be wielded together in a whirlwind of slashing arcs. The dimachaerus fighting style demands speed and aggression over defense. Each blade bears a mirrored wolf engraving.

items.name: Warden's Flail
items.description: A chain-linked flail once used by arena wardens to discipline unruly gladiators. Its spiked head wraps around shields and catches limbs. The chain rattles like a jailer's keys with every swing.

items.name: Iron War Pick
items.description: A brutal puncturing weapon designed to defeat heavy armor with concentrated force. The narrow spike finds gaps in plate and mail with surgical precision. Secutores learned to fear this tool above all others.

items.name: Obsidian Edge
items.description: A gladius with a blade of knapped volcanic glass set into a bronze hilt. The edge is sharper than any steel but brittle as a tyrant's mercy. When it shatters, it leaves glass shards embedded in the wound.

items.name: Bloodthorn Spatha
items.description: A long sword whose fuller is lined with tiny iron thorns that drink spilled blood through capillary channels. The blade darkens to crimson during prolonged combat as the thorns saturate. Healers say wounds from this weapon never fully close.

items.name: Centurion's Pilum
items.description: A masterwork heavy javelin once carried by a decorated centurion who fell to disgrace and the arena. The long iron shank bends on impact, making it impossible to pull from a shield. It carries the weight of a soldier's broken honor.

items.name: Shadow Sica
items.description: A curved blade quenched in ink and nightshade, turning the steel an unnatural black that seems to swallow torchlight. Fighters wielding it appear to strike from the darkness itself. The blade leaves wounds that bruise purple and black.

items.name: Bone Reaper
items.description: A massive two-handed falx with a blade of layered bone and iron, forged by a Dacian prisoner who swore vengeance against Rome. It hooks over shield rims and peels armor apart. The bone layers give it a mottled, diseased appearance.

items.name: Viper's Fang
items.description: A slender thrusting sword with a hollow channel running the length of the blade, once used to deliver venom. The poison reservoirs are long dry, but the needle-thin point pierces deeper than any gladius. Arena physicians dread treating its wounds.

items.name: Ember Hammer
items.description: A war hammer whose iron head was quenched in the molten slag of a collapsed forge. Faint orange veins of trapped heat still glow within the metal on cold nights. Each impact leaves a scorched ring on flesh and steel alike.

items.name: Gladius of the Condemned
items.description: Etched with the names of every gladiator who wielded it before dying in the arena, this blade carries a grim legacy. There is still room for one more name. Superstitious fighters say the dead names whisper tactics during combat.

items.name: Crimson Trident
items.description: Forged from red-tinged iron mined beneath a battlefield cemetery, this trident seems perpetually stained with blood. The three prongs are wickedly long and barbed at the base. Water cannot wash the red from its surface.

items.name: Wraithclaw Dagger
items.description: A jet-black dagger that trails wisps of dark vapor when swung, as though the blade cuts through the veil between worlds. It was found clutched in the hand of a gladiator who died standing upright. The grip is unnaturally cold.

items.name: Inferno Cleaver
items.description: A massive broad-bladed weapon forged in volcanic vents beneath Vesuvius. The metal retains an unnatural heat that blisters skin on contact. Flames seem to dance along its edge in the arena torchlight, and wounds it inflicts cauterize black.

items.name: Doom Gladius
items.description: An ancient gladius unearthed from a cursed battlefield where an entire legion vanished overnight. Dark runes pulse along the blade in a language no scholar can decipher. Those who wield it fight with inhuman ferocity but hear whispering in their sleep.

items.name: Void Trident
items.description: A trident forged from metal so dark it appears as a hole cut in reality. Where its prongs strike, the air crackles and light bends. Retiarii who carry it say the net is unnecessary because opponents freeze when they see the void approach.

items.name: Blood Drinker
items.description: A falcata whose blade is riddled with microscopic pores that absorb blood on contact, turning the steel a deeper red with each kill. Veteran gladiators claim the blade grows heavier with the lives it has consumed. It hums faintly after a fresh kill.

items.name: Tyrant's Maul
items.description: A colossal war hammer once mounted above the throne of a deposed emperor, torn down by the mob and carried into the arena. Its iron head is cast in the shape of a screaming face. Each blow lands with the authority of an empire's wrath.

items.name: Nightfall Spatha
items.description: A long sword whose blade transitions from polished silver at the hilt to absolute black at the tip, as if dipped in concentrated darkness. It was said to be forged during a solar eclipse by a blind swordsmith. Torchlight dies within a hand's breadth of the edge.

items.name: Wailing Falx
items.description: A great curved Dacian war scythe fitted with holes along its spine that produce a hideous shriek when swung at speed. The sound paralyzes lesser fighters with primal terror. Arena crowds fall silent when they hear its banshee cry.

items.name: Scorpion Sting
items.description: A segmented blade that flexes like a scorpion's tail, delivering strikes from unexpected angles. The tip secretes a corrosive residue from the alchemical treatment of the steel. Wounds fester and blacken within hours if left untreated.

items.name: Ashen Executioner
items.description: A broad-headed axe forged from the melted chains of a thousand executed prisoners. Grey ash perpetually flakes from the blade as though it burns from within. The condemned recognize their shackles in its steel and lose the will to fight.

items.name: Plaguebringer Mace
items.description: A flanged mace coated in verdigris and wrapped in strips of cloth soaked in pestilent water. Every wound it inflicts festers with unnatural speed. Arena physicians burn the rags after treating its victims, but the infection always returns.

items.name: Blade of Ruin
items.description: A legendary weapon said to have been forged in the depths of Tartarus from the broken chains of a titan. Its edge never dulls and its weight shifts to match the will of its wielder. Entire dynasties of champions have risen and fallen by this sword.

items.name: Soul Harvest
items.description: A great scythe of black iron that glows with a sickly green luminescence in the presence of the dying. Legends say it was carried by Death's own champion in the first arena ever built. Every soul it claims adds a faint green mote that orbits the blade.

items.name: Emperor's Verdict
items.description: A golden gladius carried by the legendary Emperor-Champion who descended into the arena to fight alongside his gladiators. The blade is inlaid with imperial purple and bears the words of final judgment. When it is raised, even the gods hold their breath.

items.name: Abyssal Trident
items.description: Pulled from the black depths of a flooded colosseum where an entire naumachia went wrong, this trident is encrusted with deep-sea growths that pulse with bioluminescence. Water follows it in defiance of gravity. The drowned dead stir when it is near.

items.name: Cataclysm
items.description: A two-handed war hammer forged from a meteorite that struck the arena during a championship bout, killing both fighters. The cosmic metal defies conventional metallurgy and grows stronger with each impact. The ground cracks beneath its blows.

items.name: Sanguine Majesty
items.description: A ceremonial spatha bathed in the blood of one hundred undefeated champions across a century of arena combat. The blood has fused with the steel at a molecular level, creating a metal that hungers. It vibrates with barely contained violence when drawn.

items.name: Eclipse Falcata
items.description: A curved blade that exists partially outside of normal reality, its edge visible only as a distortion in the air like a heat shimmer. It was forged during the last total eclipse by a smith who went blind completing it. What it cuts stays cut forever.

items.name: Throne Breaker
items.description: A colossal falx etched with the names of every tyrant slain by gladiator revolt throughout history. The blade grows warm in the presence of those who abuse power. It was wielded by the legendary slave-king who burned three arenas to the ground.

items.name: Death's Whisper
items.description: A slender estoc so thin it is nearly invisible when viewed edge-on, yet it punches through the heaviest armor like parchment. Those struck by it hear a quiet voice telling them to lie down and rest. Many obey before realizing the wound is fatal.

items.name: Godslayer Pilum
items.description: A javelin of dark iron tipped with a shard of something older than Rome itself, recovered from the deepest catacombs beneath the Colosseum. It was thrown once at a living god and drew divine blood. The stain on the tip glows faintly gold at midnight.
